name: BNBShare
description: BNBShare is a token launchpad built on BNB Smart Chain that leverages Flap.sh infrastructure for token creation. The platform enables users to deploy tokens with configurable trading tax rates (1-10%) and a fee-sharing mechanism that routes collected trading fees to a designated wallet address. Token creators specify a beneficiary address during deployment, and all subsequent trading fees are automatically directed to that wallet. The application includes an integrated claiming interface where beneficiaries can access, manage, and transfer their accumulated fees through social login authentication.
